name: Blank Builder Book
subtitle: A minimal profile for custom nonfiction
description: A minimal book profile with only lightweight voice and chapter defaults.
writingSystem: Write clearly from concrete evidence toward reusable ideas. Keep the reader oriented and keep the prose specific.
voiceRules: Use concrete nouns and active verbs.
Keep claims tied to scenes, examples, or artifacts.
Prefer useful distinctions over broad declarations.
visualCadence: Use visuals when they make an idea easier to see.

starterChapters.title: Untitled Chapter
starterChapters.body:
# Untitled Chapter

Begin from the artifact, scene, question, or constraint that makes this chapter necessary.
